init.title: Configure ESPSomfy-RTS
init.description: Set up the security options configured for your device

stop_shade.name: Stop shade
stop_shade.description: Stops the shade at its current position

set_shade_position.name: Set position
set_shade_position.description: Sets the shade opening position in percentage

position.name: Position
position.description: The target position of the shade

tilt_open.name: Open tilt
tilt_open.description: Tilts the slats to the open position

tilt_close.name: Close tilt
tilt_close.description: Tilts the slats to the closed position

set_tilt_position.name: Set tilt position
set_tilt_position.description: Sets the tilt position of the slats in percentage

tilt_position.name: Tilt position
tilt_position.description: The target tilt of the slats

set_current_position.name: Force current position
set_current_position.description: Sets the current position in HA without operating the motor

set_current_tilt_position.name: Force current tilt position
set_current_tilt_position.description: Sets the current tilt position in HA without operating the motor

set_sunny.name: Set sunlight status
set_sunny.description: Sends a command to the motor indicating whether it is sunny or not

set_windy.name: Set wind status
set_windy.description: Sends a command to the motor indicating whether it is windy or not

send_command.name: Send RTS command
send_command.description: Sends any raw command using the RTS protocol

repeat.name: Repeat
repeat.description: Number of times the command will be repeated

direction.name: Direction
direction.description: The direction of the step (Up / Down)

step_size.name: Step size
step_size.description: The size of the step (127 being the maximum)

repeat.name: Repeat
repeat.description: Number of times the command will be repeated

reboot.name: Restart
reboot.description: Triggers a restart of the ESPSomfy-RTS device

backup.name: Backup
backup.description: Triggers a backup of the ESPSomfy-RTS device configuration
